mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Lydia Hylton, Until she reached 21 years of age 12.06.1899
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Lydia Hylton, Until she reached 21 years of age 12.06.1899 Guardianship of Laura C. Hylton, Until she reached 21 years of age 09.15.1900 Guardianship of Ada Hylton, Until she reached 21 years of age 03.22.1902 Recorded in Ledger Book 5, Page 258-9, in the Floyd County Courthouse
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
